tools.name: search
tools.description: Search nearly 2,500 hand-curated architecture, design, photography and art projects from Thisispaper. Returns a list of results with id, title and url.

tools.name: fetch
tools.description: Retrieve the full record for one Thisispaper project by id (the id returned by search). Returns title, text and the public url.

tools.name: search_projects
tools.description: Search 2,491 hand-curated architecture, design, photography and art projects from Thisispaper. Returns ranked summaries (name, studio, city, year, category, intro, thumbnail, url). Without an API key, results are capped at 5; pass Authorization: Bearer tip_live_... for full results.

tools.name: similar_projects
tools.description: Nearest projects to a given slug by visual + semantic similarity (precomputed SigLIP neighbours). Use the slug from search_projects results.

tools.name: get_project
tools.description: Full metadata for one project: machine-written description, design language, details and dimensions, plus the public URL.

tools.name: search_by_taste
tools.description: Search by taste metadata: material, light, color, mood, composition, subject. Unique to Thisispaper: these tags were written during human curation. Provide at least one dimension; results are ranked by how many dimensions match, then by recency.

tools.name: browse
tools.description: Newest projects in the archive first, optionally filtered by category: architecture, interiors, design, photography or art.

tools.name: discover
tools.description: One project chosen at random from the archive. Editorial serendipity: the way a reader opens a magazine to an unplanned spread.

tools.name: get_api_key
tools.description: Mint a FREE Thisispaper Intelligence API key (200 calls/month) for an email address. The key is shown once; use it as Authorization: Bearer tip_live_... on this MCP endpoint and on the REST API. Max 3 keys per email.

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "search" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "fetch" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "search_projects" references sensitive artifacts (authorization, bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Search 2,491 hand-curated architecture, design, photography and art projects from Thisispaper. Returns ranked summaries (name, studio, city, year, category, int…

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "browse" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "get_api_key" references sensitive artifacts (authorization, bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Mint a FREE Thisispaper Intelligence API key (200 calls/month) for an email address. The key is shown once; use it as Authorization: Bearer tip_live_... on this…

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: search, fetch, search_projects, get_project, get_api_key · Private data: fetch, search_projects, get_api_key · Public sink: get_api_key.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: search, fetch, search_projects, get_project, get_api_key · Private data: fetch, search_projects, get_api_key · Public sink: get_api_key

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
